finding: 11-node repro: Group>Circles>1st left copy{Circle 6 (factoryID=12 shape) + Clone B copy 21 (factoryID=15 clone) + <mask Image Mask factoryID=1>}. f10-f18 diverge ~6.1 dB uniformly: FCP masks the clone to the circle (a concentric RING); the ENGINE drops the GROUP-level Image Mask (parser extracts imageMaskSourceId only on <scenenode>, not <group>/<layer>) so it renders unmasked full-frame clone instead of the ring. Fix = wire imageMaskSourceId on group/layer parse (see docs/notes/salvage/group-image-mask-parser.patch) AND apply a group-level mask in the compositor (index.ts renderChildLayers; currently masks only leaf-drawables at :478).
gate_result: Group-image-mask fix (parser+compositor) improved this MINIMAL repro 25.98->40.08 dB (f10-f18 6.1->24.3) BUT the full GUI-GT gate REGRESSED 4 slugs: Combo_Spin -4.28, Pinwheel -3.46, Close_and_Open -1.29, Concentric itself -0.94 (Center +0.46). Root cause: the group mask is rasterized in SCREEN space, but Pinwheel/Combo_Spin/Concentric ring groups carry a 3D swing rotation on the GROUP — the mask source (a child shape) must be rasterized in the GROUP-LOCAL frame and transformed WITH the group, not in output space. WIP salvaged to docs/notes/salvage/group-image-mask-compositor*. Reverted; gate green. Needs group-local mask rasterization.
